title: ranunculus flammeus var. ovatus
intro: Ranunculus flammeus var. ovatus is a variant of the ranunculus flammeus plant, commonly known as the yellow water buttercup or golden buttercup. It is a flowering plant in the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can be used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Ranunculus flammeus var. ovatus include infusions and decoctions that can be used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory issues, and skin conditions.
